# doc2md

> Browser-only document to Markdown conversion. Files stay local in the normal flow.

## Core docs

- [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KjellKod/doc2md/main/README.md)
- [Architecture](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KjellKod/doc2md/main/docs/architecture.md)
- [Product Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KjellKod/doc2md/main/docs/product-spec.md)
- [Testing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KjellKod/doc2md/main/docs/testing.md)
- [Provenance](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KjellKod/doc2md/main/docs/provenance.md)
- [License](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KjellKod/doc2md/main/LICENSE)

## Notes for LLMs

- This project is intentionally client-side first and privacy-forward.
- Do not infer a backend, worker, queue, or API surface from this repo unless such code is explicitly added later.
- PDF support is best-effort and text-first, not OCR.
